metadata.name: transcribe-zh-en-p2
metadata.summary: This package is a part of a larger pipeline. This is package (PART:2). A package to convert Video containing spoken Chinese audio and Chinese written text and convert it into spoken English and English written text.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.load_api_key
documentation:
Load the OpenAI API key from the .env file located in the secrets directory.
If no secrets directory is provided, it will look for the .env file in the current working directory.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.get_session_with_retries
documentation: Create a requests session with retry logic.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.send_audio_to_openai
documentation:
Send the audio file to OpenAI's /v1/audio/translations endpoint to get a translation/transcription
in SRT format based on the provided subtitle prompt.

Args:
    api_key (str): OpenAI API key.
    audio_file (str): Path to the audio file.
    subtitle_file (str): Path to the subtitle file.
    input_lang (str): Input language code (e.g., 'zh' for Chinese).
    target_lang (str): Target language code ('en' for English, 'zh' for Chinese).
    proxy_host_ip (str, optional): Proxy host IP address.
    proxy_host_port (str, optional): Proxy host port number.

Returns:
    dict or None: JSON response from OpenAI API or None if failed.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.translate_srt
documentation:
Translate the given SRT content from source_lang to target_lang using OpenAI's Chat Completion API.

Args:
    api_key (str): OpenAI API key.
    srt_content (str): Content of the SRT file.
    source_lang (str): Source language code (e.g., 'en').
    target_lang (str): Target language code (e.g., 'fr').
    proxy_host_ip (str, optional): Proxy host IP address.
    proxy_host_port (str, optional): Proxy host port number.

Returns:
    str or None: Translated SRT content or None if failed.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.convert_to_srt
documentation: Convert the verbose JSON transcription response into SRT format.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.format_time
documentation: Convert seconds to SRT time format: HH:MM:SS,MS

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.parse_srt_timestamp
documentation: Helper function to parse SRT timestamp

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.format_srt_timestamp
documentation: Helper function to format timedelta to SRT timestamp format

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.estimate_audio_length
documentation: Estimate audio length based on word count (words per minute average 150)

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.fix_first_segment_start_time
documentation: Function to fix the start time of the first subtitle based on the audio length estimate

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.process_video_directory
documentation: Process each subdirectory under the input directory, look for audio and subtitle files.
Existing function to process the video directory

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.check_dependencies
documentation: Verify that all required external dependencies are installed and accessible.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_p2.main.entry_point
documentation: Ensure dependencies are checked before running main
